_doc: Slope window per PLATEAU amount. levels[i] applies to PLATEAU = i. Slopes at or above `fullTerraceMinSlope` get snapped to TERRAIN_D_TERRAIN levels at full strength (turning steep terrain into a staircase of plateaus + cliffs). Slopes at or below `noTerraceMaxSlope` stay smooth (untouched). The band in between fades smoothly. Use `null` to mean +Infinity (no slope ever triggers terracing — useful for OFF). For PLATEAU = 5 (cliffs everywhere) set both to 0 so every non-zero slope terraces. Index 0 (PLATEAU OFF) is unused at runtime since the sim short-circuits on amount <= 0, but is kept so the array is index-aligned with the bar buttons.
